_comment: Example criteria for a review on plasma wave instabilities in engineering systems

pico.population: Engineering and physics systems exhibiting plasma or electromagnetic wave phenomena
pico.intervention: Analytical, numerical, or experimental methods for studying wave instabilities
pico.comparison: Classical vs. quantum or linear vs. nonlinear treatment (where applicable)
pico.outcome: Growth rates, dispersion relations, stability thresholds, or experimental validation

inclusion: Peer-reviewed journal articles or conference proceedings
Studies providing quantitative results or theoretical derivations
Works addressing wave propagation, instability, or turbulence in plasma or similar media
exclusion: Pure review or opinion articles without new results
Studies focused exclusively on astrophysical plasmas with no engineering relevance
